description_long: This plant pot features a modern, tapered rectangular design with a wide, dark gray rim and base, and a central body composed of horizontal light wood slats. The wood slats are evenly spaced, creating a visually appealing striped effect that contrasts with the smooth, solid-colored top and bottom sections. The pot is open at the top, providing ample space for planting, while the interior appears hollow and deep. The overall construction suggests durability and stability, suitable for outdoor or high-traffic urban environments. The combination of wood and dark gray materials gives it a contemporary, urban aesthetic. The pot's clean lines and lack of ornate decoration make it versatile for various public or private settings.
description: A modern, tapered rectangular plant pot with horizontal light wood slats and a wide dark gray rim and base. Its clean, contemporary design is both sturdy and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide dark gray rim and base, with the central body of horizontal light wood slats.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same wood slat pattern, with the dark gray rim and base visible; proportions remain consistent.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, displaying the uniform wood slat arrangement and dark gray accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with the same materials and design features.
attribute_placement_context: commonly used in urban streetscapes or public plazas to hold decorative plants or small trees
